name: eba-protokoll
description: Native Codex plugin for generating EBA-compliant meeting records from transcripts with the original QMG templates.

interface.shortDescription: Create EBA meeting records from transcripts.
interface.longDescription: Turn EBA Protokoll App transcripts into QMG-based DOCX, PDF, and XLSX records with native Codex skills for routing, preparation, continuation, extraction, participant resolution, and validation.
defaultPrompt: Create the correct EBA protocol from this transcript.
Prepare this transcript and resolve its speakers.
Validate this EBA protocol before delivery.
